context: Relief rally that cleared both of today's binaries. June CPI landed soft — headline -0.4% on tumbling gasoline, core flat m/m — collapsing July hike odds to ~12% from near 50%; Warsh's first House testimony then passed without breaking the move (vigilant-on-inflation script, stocks at session highs, BTC ~$64.5k). The remaining catch: Senate Banking round 2 tomorrow 10am ET — one hawkish reframe can still round-trip the gap. Stance across BTC / XRP / SUI / SOL: NEUTRAL-constructive — buy pullbacks and reclaims, don't chase highs into round 2.

tickers.thesis: XRP is +2.9% to ~$1.10 on the macro relief (soft June CPI, July hike odds → ~12%), but that is a borrowed rally — the coin's own binary, the CLARITY Act, is jammed in the Senate short of votes on three fights (Trump's crypto income, DeFi rules, stablecoin rewards), with the floor vote needing to clear before the August recess (odds ~40-50%). Note XRP is still -2.4% on the week even after today's pop. Bias NEUTRAL with a downside skew on legislative headlines: long only on a sweep-and-reclaim of the $1.055 24h low with momentum; sub-$1 is live if CLARITY stalls, and a daily close below $1.05 invalidates.
levels: Psychological — sub-$1 risk on CLARITY stall

setup.entry: Long the sweep-and-reclaim of $1.055 into the $1.07-1.08 OTE (70.5%), NY killzone momentum only
setup.invalidation: Daily close < $1.05; or a CLARITY stall / shelved-bill headline

catalysts: CLARITY Act — jammed in the Senate on 3 fights (Trump crypto income, DeFi rules, stablecoin rewards); floor vote needed before the Aug recess, odds ~40-50%. THE binary. [Regulatory-US]
Macro relief — soft June CPI (Jul 14) cut July hike odds to ~12%; lifts the whole complex but is not CLARITY progress. [Macro-Risk]
XRP spot ETFs — ~$1.44B cumulative; Standard Chartered models $4-8B first-year IF CLARITY passes. [ETF & Flows]

insights.title: Sentiment deepening: F&G 22 (Extreme Fear), Δ -6 vs yesterday
insights.body: Crypto Fear & Greed Index printed 22 (Extreme Fear) at 18:57Z — -6 vs yesterday's reading. F&G under 30 historically aligns with bounce-watch zones; under 20 with capitulation. Combined with the recent price action and live headlines (see LIVE FEED), the regime is risk-off until a sweep-and-reclaim candle prints. No new longs until F&G stops falling AND BTC reclaims its 24h high.

insights.title: Today's macro releases (auto from ForexFactory)
insights.body: USD high-impact releases registered today: ✓ Core CPI m/m → forecast 0.2% | prev 0.2%; ✓ Core CPI y/y → forecast 2.8% | prev 2.9%; ✓ CPI m/m → forecast -0.1% | prev 0.5%. Live event data pulled from ForexFactory weekly JSON at 18:57Z.

insights.title: The rally the tape doesn't believe
insights.body: BTC reclaimed $64.2k and held it through the House testimony, yet Fear & Greed FELL to 22 (Δ -6) on the day — sentiment is not buying what price is doing. Disbelief rallies can run, but the shelf has to keep holding; losing $64.2k after round 2 tomorrow flips this from reclaim to bull trap.

insights.title: 'CPI dip masks core' is the trap
insights.body: The headline dropped mostly on gasoline; core cooled to 2.6% YoY but still sits above target — and Warsh told the House the improvement is not 'mission accomplished', with 'no tolerance for persistently elevated inflation'. The market chose to trade the soft print today; the Senate round tomorrow is where that one-sentence hawkish reframe risk lives.

insights.title: XRP's clock is running out
insights.body: Today's XRP pop is macro-driven, not CLARITY progress — the coin is still -2.4% on the week, and sub-$1 risk stays live on any stall headline with the pre-recess window closing. Trade the level ($1.055 reclaim), not the story.

insights.title: SUI leads, SOL lags — the L1-rotation tell
insights.body: SUI is +4.4% 24h / +2.2% 7d; SOL is +2.5% 24h but -5.2% 7d. Money is favoring SUI's ending unlock-cliff + ETF pipeline over SOL's inflow-absorbed-by-unlocks paradox. In a relief bounce, relative strength is the tell — SUI is the cleaner long-on-reclaim, SOL the cleaner fade.

hidden_signals.body: Fear & Greed at 22 (Extreme Fear), Δ -6 vs yesterday — sub-30 zones historically align with bounce setups but require a sweep-and-reclaim candle to confirm
July rate-hike odds collapsed to ~12% (from near 50%) within minutes of the soft CPI — the clearest repricing of the day lives in the rates market, not on any crypto chart.

Warsh's House testimony is DONE and the market held — but his 'we're not bailing out anybody, including crypto' line quietly re-prices the Fed put for this asset class; Senate Banking round 2 is tomorrow 10am ET.
Iran conflict reignited with oil +~5% (Jul 8) — a second-order inflation impulse that can undo the very disinflation read today's CPI delivered; not on any crypto screen.
CLARITY Act prediction-market odds sit at ~40-50% (down from ~73% early in the year) with the Senate back as of Jul 13 — a leading legislative gauge the XRP price feed does not show.
